name: sql-reference-search
title: SQL Reference Search
description: Dialect-aware SQL reference with syntax, examples, and practical query patterns for PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite, and T-SQL.
author: FariaF22

preferences.name: preferredDialect
preferences.title: Preferred SQL Dialect
preferences.description: Fallback dialect used when no previous dropdown selection is stored.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
